titleStmt.title: SII 26.635: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 635. (A.R. No. 601 of 1909.) MŌṬUPALLE, BAPATLA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On another pillar of the same maṇḍapa.

p.hi: Aṉṉapōttu Reḍḍi: Śaka 1280, Viḷambi, Āvaṇi 15 = 1358, A.D., August 13.

summary.p: This inscription seems to be incomplete.

It records a regulation instituted by the merchants on the sea and those residing in the seashore towns. It states that whosoever stayed at Moṭṭuppaḷḷi his needs must be fulfilled, and there was no objection for him to move to any place. The levy called aputrika-deṇḍam was not to be imposed on the foreigners. The usual rate of customs was allowed on gold and silver. Three-fourth of the former duty was remitted on exported sandal. Foreigners could sell their merchandise to whomsoever they liked and could buy whatever other articles they liked. The cloth for women was not to be levied. For other items of merchandise the duty was to be levied as before. This was the procedure followed in the añjināṉpugaliḍam (place of security to persons in distrees).
It further records that for every 100 articles imported from the south 3 articles should be given and for every 100 clothes, two clothes should be given, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīmatu caka
raiyāṇṭu 10 2[8 10]
meṟ cellāniṉṟa vi
ḷampi caṅvaṟcarattu
Āvaṇi mātam 10 5
tiyati svastiśrīmatu
Aṉṉapottu
reṭṭiyāreṉ tipā
ntirattil viyā
pārikaḷukkum karai
ppaṭṭaṇaṅkaḷi
l nānāteciviyā
pārikaḷukkum Iṭ
ṭa matiyāri cātaṉa
k kalveṭṭu mo
ṭṭuppaḷḷikku yā
toruttar kuṭiyiru
kkumaḷavukku Iva
rkaḷukku veṇṭu
nalappāṭu ceytu
Avarkaḷukku pūṟu
vattil Uḷḷa kāṇi
toṭṭamum kuṭut
tu tāṅkaḷ Irukku
nāḷ Iruntu Ivaṭa
tti niṉṟu veṇṭiṉa
Iṭattukku poka ku
ṟaiyillai parate
cikaḷukku Aputtiri
ka teṇṭam koḷ
ḷak kaṭavomal
la poṉ veḷḷik
ku Āyam Uḷḷatu
viṭṭom canti
ṇattukku puṟappā
ṭu cuṅkam pūṟuva
m koḷḷumatil mu
ṉṟattoṉṟu vi
ṭṭom tāṅkaḷ
koṇṭu vanta cara
kku veṇṭiṉapaṭi
veṇṭuvāṟku
viṟṟu veṇṭi
ṉapaṭi maṟu cara
kkuṅ koṇ
ṭu poka kaṭava
kaḷ paṇṭārat
tukku koṇ
ṭu puṭavai Iṭa
k kaṭavomal
la maṟṟuḷḷa cara
kkukaḷukku cuṅ
kam pūṟuvam
koḷḷumpaṭi ta
ppāmal koḷ
ḷak kaṭavom
Ippaṭiyai put
ti paṇṇi Ellā
ru vāka kuṟai I
llai Añcinā
ṉ pukaliṭam
matiyārippaṭi . te
ṟkiṉṟum varum
Uruvukku Iṟakku
mati nūṟṟukku mu
ṉṟum Ēṟṟumati
puṭavai 2 10 5 100 kku
rūpāy § vaṭakkiṉ
ṟu varum Uruvukku
100- ṟṟukku rūpāy Eṟṟu
mati puṭavai Uru
3 kku rūpāy 3 tipān
tirattil Uruvuk
ku Iṟakkumati kut
tai Ēṟṟumati pu
ṭavai 2 10 5 nūṟṟu
kku rūpāy 3 muttuk
ku nūṟṟukku Ēḻa

Digital edition of SII 26.635 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
